name: Double Chocolate Cookie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and melted butter, pressing the mixture into a 13x9 inch pan.
2. Melt 1 cup of chocolate chips with sweetened condensed milk and vanilla in a microwave or saucepan.
3. Pour the melted chocolate mixture over the crust.
4. Sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
5. Add the remaining chocolate chips.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes.
7. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
8. Store in an airtight container at room temperature.
